pi_items.source: Docker Jitsi Meet documentation and configuration patterns; verified via https://github.com/jitsi/docker-jitsi-meet and https://jitsi.github.io/handbook/docs/dev-guide/dev-guide-configuration/
Docker Jitsi Meet configuration pattern; standard location for custom overrides in containerized deployments

Valid Universal Analytics (UA) tracking ID format: UA-[account_id]-[property_id]. Confirmed through multiple Google Analytics documentation sources: https://developers.google.com/analytics/devguides/reporting/data/v1/property-id and https://support.similarweb.com/hc/en-us/articles/7783050018589-How-to-find-Google-Analytics-Tracking-ID

Jitsi Meet standard analytics handler library path; verified through Jitsi Meet GitHub community discussions and configuration examples at https://community.jitsi.org/t/how-to-correctly-enable-google-analytics/80256 and Jitsi Meet analytics gist at https://gist.github.com/lmangani/fa2c9fe6920d58212027f6a2898f6c30
Task export_result.sh script expects evidence screenshot at this location; home directory for user 'ga' in the test environment

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic test environment task for Jitsi Meet Google Analytics configuration. The task uses a Docker-based Jitsi Meet deployment with configuration files stored in /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/. The expected tracking ID 'UA-88224411-1' is a valid Universal Analytics format (UA-[account_id]-[property_id]). The analytics script 'libs/analytics-ga.min.js' is the legitimate Google Analytics handler used by Jitsi Meet. All configuration paths and script references are authentic Jitsi Meet components and follow standard Docker deployment patterns.
